meaning: 1. to draw; 2. to derive; 3. to absorb
sentence: 我们要善于汲取前人的经验。
pinyin: Wǒmen yào shànyú jíqǔ qiánrén de jīngyàn.
english: We should be good at drawing on the experience of those who came before us.

meaning: 1. to write comments on a report submitted by a subordinate; 2. writte
sentence: 领导已在报告上写了批示。
pinyin: Lǐngdǎo yǐ zài bàogào shàng xiě le pīshì.
english: The leader has already written comments on the report.

sentence: 这把刀是用不锈钢做的，不容易生锈。
pinyin: Zhè bǎ dāo shì yòng bùxiùgāng zuò de, bù róngyì shēng xiù.
english: This knife is made of stainless steel and doesn't rust easily.

meaning: 1. overhead; 2. elevated (walkway, highway etc); 3. elevated road
sentence: 走高架比走地面快二十分钟。
pinyin: Zǒu gāojià bǐ zǒu dìmiàn kuài èrshí fēnzhōng.
english: Taking the elevated road is twenty minutes faster than driving on surface streets.

meaning: 1. variant of 交匯|交汇; 2. to flow together; 3. confluence (of rivers, ai
sentence: 两条河在城市南边交汇。
pinyin: Liǎng tiáo hé zài chéngshì nánbiān jiāohuì.
english: The two rivers converge at the south side of the city.
